name: fast-send-monorepo
description: Simple LAN file and text sharing tool
author: FastSend Team

scripts.client: npm run sync:hmr --workspace=@fast-send/client && npm run dev --workspace=@fast-send/client
scripts.build:client: npm run build --workspace=@fast-send/client && (if exist packages\server-go\dist (rmdir /s /q packages\server-go\dist)) && xcopy /e /i /y packages\client\dist packages\server-go\dist
scripts.build:upx: echo 'UPX disabled to avoid false virus alerts'
scripts.build:all: node scripts/sync-version.js && npm run build:client && npm run build:go && npm run build:upx && npm run build:release-apk
scripts.release: npm run build:all && echo '打包完成！请手动上传 out 目录下的文件到 GitHub Release。'
